name: Kino Ilustrisimo
title: Python Automation and Data Operations Portfolio
positioning: Future-ready portfolio for job, client, recruiter, and stakeholder review.
botPersonalityRules: The assistant must sound professional, confident, friendly, and helpful.
The assistant must answer in the same language used by the visitor when possible.
The assistant must understand English, Filipino, Taglish, informal phrasing, and incorrect grammar.
The assistant must guide visitors toward Kino's skills, projects, services, experience, tools, contact options, or availability.
The assistant must act as a portfolio assistant, service recommender, project explainer, and client inquiry helper.
The assistant must not invent missing information.
The assistant must not disclose private address, salary, credentials, debtor information, account-level data, confidential client data, internal URLs, or private company information.

sections.title: About Me
sections.summary: Kino Ilustrisimo is a practical data operations and Python automation professional focused on reporting workflows, dashboard monitoring, collection strategy support, process improvement, and operational performance visibility.
sections.summaryFilipino: Si Kino Ilustrisimo ay isang practical data operations at Python automation professional na focused sa reporting workflows, dashboard monitoring, collection strategy support, process improvement, at operational performance visibility.
bullets: Builds tools that reduce manual reporting work
Turns operational pain points into usable automation and dashboard outputs
Positions his portfolio for future job and client opportunities
bulletsFilipino: Gumagawa ng tools para mabawasan ang manual reporting work
Ginagawang usable automation at dashboard outputs ang operational pain points
Positioned ang portfolio niya para sa future job at client opportunities

sections.title: Tools and Technologies
sections.summary: Kino's technical stack includes Python 3.14, FastAPI, Uvicorn, DuckDB, Pandas, PyArrow, MySQL, PyMySQL, plain HTML/CSS/JavaScript, Selenium, Google Chrome automation, CustomTkinter, XlsxWriter, CSV generation, and automated PowerPoint or management report scripts.
sections.summaryFilipino: Kasama sa technical stack ni Kino ang Python 3.14, FastAPI, Uvicorn, DuckDB, Pandas, PyArrow, MySQL, PyMySQL, plain HTML/CSS/JavaScript, Selenium, Google Chrome automation, CustomTkinter, XlsxWriter, CSV generation, at automated PowerPoint o management report scripts.
bullets: Backend: Python 3.14, FastAPI, and Uvicorn
Data and analytics: DuckDB, Pandas, and PyArrow
Database integration: MySQL and PyMySQL
Frontend: plain HTML, CSS, and JavaScript without React, Vue, Node.js, or a frontend build system
Automation and UI: Selenium, Google Chrome automation, and CustomTkinter
Reporting exports: XlsxWriter, CSV generation, and automated PowerPoint or management report scripts
bulletsFilipino: Backend: Python 3.14, FastAPI, at Uvicorn
Data at analytics: DuckDB, Pandas, at PyArrow
Database integration: MySQL at PyMySQL
Frontend: plain HTML, CSS, at JavaScript na walang React, Vue, Node.js, o frontend build system
Automation at UI: Selenium, Google Chrome automation, at CustomTkinter
Reporting exports: XlsxWriter, CSV generation, at automated PowerPoint o management report scripts

sections.title: Expanded Development Stack
sections.summary: The projects presented in the portfolio are an initial sample of Kino's developed applications. Other projects include more advanced features, automation, data processing, reporting, and database integration using Python 3.14, FastAPI, Uvicorn, DuckDB, Pandas, PyArrow, MySQL, PyMySQL, plain HTML/CSS/JavaScript, Selenium, Chrome automation, CustomTkinter, XlsxWriter, CSV generation, and automated PowerPoint or management report scripts.
sections.summaryFilipino: Ang mga project na ipinapakita sa portfolio ay initial sample pa lang ng applications na nadevelop ni Kino. May ibang projects na may mas advanced features, automation, data processing, reporting, at database integration gamit ang Python 3.14, FastAPI, Uvicorn, DuckDB, Pandas, PyArrow, MySQL, PyMySQL, plain HTML/CSS/JavaScript, Selenium, Chrome automation, CustomTkinter, XlsxWriter, CSV generation, at automated PowerPoint o management report scripts.
bullets: Develops end-to-end web applications and automation workflows
Works with database management, data analytics, and external MySQL integration
Builds desktop tools and lightweight frontend interfaces without a frontend build system
Generates CSV, Excel, PowerPoint, and management reporting outputs through scripts
bulletsFilipino: Gumagawa ng end-to-end web applications at automation workflows
May experience sa database management, data analytics, at external MySQL integration
Gumagawa ng desktop tools at lightweight frontend interfaces na walang frontend build system
Nagge-generate ng CSV, Excel, PowerPoint, at management reporting outputs gamit ang scripts
